h1.visual_description: Centered, bold, large serif font, title case, typically preceded and followed by horizontal rules on the first page.
h1.example_text: ContextFlow: Context-Aware Flow Matching for Trajectory Inference from Spatial Omics Data

h2.visual_description: Left-aligned, bold, serif font, numbered (e.g., 1., 2.), larger than body text.

h3.visual_description: Left-aligned, bold, serif font, numbered with decimals (e.g., 2.1., 3.2.), same size as body text.

h4.visual_description: In-line or block, bold, italicized serif font, often used for sub-points or specific definitions within a section.

visual_matchers.pattern: Numbered list with bold header and 'Algorithm' label, enclosed in horizontal rules.
Italicized text followed by a period at the start of a paragraph.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Paragraph-level sub-heading or specific term definition.

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered block with 'Figure [N].' in italics followed by a descriptive caption.
Table with horizontal rules at top, bottom, and below headers; 'Table [N].' label in italics above the table.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Formal mathematical proof or theorem statement.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX style; inline using $...$ and block/numbered equations using centered environments with right-aligned parenthetical numbers (e.g., (1)).
markdown_grammar.table_style: html (recommended due to complex headers, merged cells, and multi-line cell content seen in Tables 2 and 4).
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-year format in blue text, e.g., (Lipman et al., 2023).

layout_info.primary_flow: Two-column layout for main body text; single-column for title, abstract, and large tables/figures.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header: 'Context-Aware Flow Matching for Trajectory Inference from Spatial Omics Data' (top center); Page numbers: centered at bottom; ArXiv watermark: vertical text on the left margin of page 1.
